apihelp-editmassmessagelist-summary: Wax ka beddel liis gudbinta farriimaha guud.
apihelp-editmassmessagelist-param-spamli: Cinwaanka liiska gudbinta ee la cusboonaysiinayo.
apihelp-editmassmessagelist-param-descri: Sharaxaad cusub oo loogu talagalay liiska gudbinta.
apihelp-editmassmessagelist-param-minor: In wax ka beddelka loo calaamadeeyo mid yar taariikhda liiska.
apihelp-editmassmessagelist-param-watchl: Si aan shuruud lahayn u dar ama uga saar bogga liiska dabagalka ee isticmaalaha hadda, isticmaal doorbidyada (lama tixgeliyo isticmaaleyaasha bot-ka) ama ha beddelin dabagalka.
apihelp-editmassmessagelist-example-1: Ku dar [[User talk:Foo]] iyo [[Talk:Bar]] liiska gudbinta [[Example]] oo ka saar [[Talk:Baz]] liiskaas
apihelp-editmassmessagelist-example-2: U deji sharaxaadda liiska gudbinta [[Example]] inay noqoto "Adeegyada gudbinta FooBar"
apihelp-massmessage-summary: U dir fariin liis bogag ah.
apihelp-massmessage-param-spamlist: Bogga ay ku qoran yihiin liiska bogagga lagu reebayo fariinta.
apihelp-massmessage-param-page-message: Bog lagu diri doono oo ay la socoto qoraalka fariinta.
apihelp-massmessage-example-1: U dir fariin liiska ku yaal [[Signpost Spamlist]] oo leh mawduuca "New Signpost", iyo qoraalka fariinta "Fadlan akhri".
apihelp-massmessage-example-2: U dir fariin liiska ku yaal [[Signpost Spamlist]] oo leh mawduuca "New Signpost", fariintuna ha noqoto nuxurka bogga "Help Page".
apihelp-massmessage-example-3: U dir fariin liiska ku yaal [[Signpost Spamlist]] oo leh mawduuca "New Signpost", iyo qoraalka fariinta "Please read it" oo lagu lifaaqay nuxurka bogga "Help Page".
apihelp-query+mmcontent-summary: Hel sharaxaadda iyo bartilmaameedyada liiska spamka
apihelp-query+mmcontent-example-1: Hel macluumaadka bogga iyo liiska spam-ka ee [[Spam list]]
apierror-massmessage-invalidspamlist: Liiska spam-ka ee la cayimay ma aha mid sax ah.
